title: gaertnera luteocarpa subsp. luteocarpa
intro: Gaertnera luteocarpa subsp. luteocarpa, also known as the 'Yellow Fruit Gaertnera', is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant's extracts and compounds have been found to have potential health benefits, including reducing oxidative stress and improving cardiovascular health. Gaertnera luteocarpa subsp. luteocarpa is traditionally used to prepare herbal remedies, often in the form of tea or decoctions, to alleviate various ailments and promote overall well-being.
